nodes.label: On-demand AI triage for a draft ticket (before creation).     If AI is enabled,
Return the latest AI suggestion for a ticket/incident/request.
Mark a suggestion as applied (agent clicked Approve & Send).
Agent dismissed the suggestion — mark it so the UI can hide it.
Heatmap data source — all active ticket clusters for this org.
Generate a Root Cause Analysis for an incident using Gemma.
Parse free-form text into a structured ticket draft using Gemma.
Turn a plain-language description into a workflow rule config using Gemma.
Generate a KB article from resolved tickets in a category using Gemma.
Utility endpoint for local dev/test reset (not for production).
